case_title: MACBRIDE SARA LAMAR et al VS WEST COAST PROPERTY, MANAGEMENT COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-17-1995, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-01-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,022.50 FILED BY MACBRIDE SARA LAMAR HELIES MIMI AS TO DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY, MANAGEMENT COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACBRIDE SARA LAMAR HELIES MIMI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY, MANAGEMENT COMPANY $1,083.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,098.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-17-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF JUN-20-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEST COAST PROPERTY, MANAGEMENT COMPANY

INVALID POS FILED. SERVER NOT NAMED.
